subcodes.title: Pain and Sorrow: Words spoken on 1911-11-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In this world we are influenced by two sentiments, Joy and Pain. Joy gives us wings! In times of joy our strength is more vital
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع بشر همیشه مورد دو احساس هستند یکی احساس سرور دیگری احساس حزن وقت سرور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
